allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); ['/dashboard','/reports','/inventory'].forEach\(async p => { await new Promise\(res => { const req = http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}}, r => { console.log\(p.padEnd\(12\), r.statusCode\); res\(\); }\); req.end\(\); }\); }\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(p\){return new Promise\(res=>{const r=http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}},rr=>{let d='';rr.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);rr.on\('end',\(\)=>res\(d\)\);}\);r.end\(\);}\);} \(async \(\) => { const d = await fetch\('/dashboard'\); console.log\('Revenue today label:', d.includes\('Revenue today'\)\); console.log\('Orders label:', d.includes\('Orders'\)\); console.log\('Avg order value:', d.includes\('Avg order value'\)\); console.log\('Guests label:', d.includes\('Guests served'\)\); console.log\('Top products header:', d.includes\('Top products'\)\); console.log\('No paid orders msg:', d.includes\('No paid orders'\)\); console.log\('Orders by hour chart:', d.includes\('Orders by hour'\)\); }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(p\){return new Promise\(res=>{const r=http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}},rr=>{let d='';rr.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);rr.on\('end',\(\)=>res\(d\)\);}\);r.end\(\);}\);} \(async \(\) => { const d = await fetch\('/dashboard'\); const m = d.match\(/Rs\\.\\s*[0-9,]+/g\); console.log\('First 8 currency tokens:', m?.slice\(0,8\)\); console.log\('Has \\"No paid orders\\" empty state:', d.includes\('No paid orders in the past week.'\)\); }\)\(\);")
